overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza, past a distinctive blue cylindrical advertisement tower, along a waterfront promenade with the Arasaka mega-tower in the background, ending at a busy street intersection. The scene features bright midday lighting, palm trees, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

events.description: crossing the street at crosswalk as a pickup truck passes by

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza and crossing the street toward the blue cylindrical tower

notable_agents.action: brown pickup truck driving across the intersection
person in white shirt walking ahead toward the tower

entered.detail: tall blue cylindrical structure with multiple digital advertisement screens wrapping around it
low orange concrete barriers lining the edge of the plaza walkway
tall palm trees lining the plaza providing sparse vegetation
modern glass skyscraper with reflective windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit urban plaza with the distinctive blue cylindrical advertisement tower dominating the center view. The camera walks forward across paved tiles, passing orange barriers and palm trees, then crosses a street at the crosswalk as a brown pickup truck drives past. Pedestrians are scattered throughout the plaza walking in various directions.

events.description: entering the covered shadow area underneath the blue cylindrical tower
exiting the shadow of the tower back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking under the tower structure and continuing along the sidewalk past various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking alongside the tower base
person with blue hair and orange pants walking past the camera

entered.detail: shadowed pedestrian area beneath the cylindrical tower structure
bright red vending machine against the blue tower base
small yellow and green vendor booth with green roof and signage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the shadowed area beneath the blue cylindrical tower, passing a red vending machine and various pedestrians. The lighting shifts from bright sun to shade and back to sunlight as the camera emerges from under the tower. A yellow-green vendor kiosk appears on the left as the walkway opens up again.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with mega-corporation tower view

events.description: transitioning from street sidewalk to waterfront promenade with canal view
descending stairs toward the water level along the embankment

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs and along the waterfront promenade toward the massive Arasaka tower

notable_agents.action: person in brown jacket walking down the stairs ahead of the camera
person with bright green hair descending the stairs toward the water

entered.detail: wide canal of greenish water with concrete embankment and railings
massive arch-shaped corporate headquarters dominating the skyline with twin towers
elevated transit bridge with support pillars spanning across the canal
concrete stairs with orange railings descending to water level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide waterfront promenade with the massive Arasaka mega-tower dominating the background across the canal. The camera descends stairs toward the water level, passing pedestrians with distinctive cybernetic modifications. Palm trees line the right side while the elevated highway bridge spans the canal ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway approaching transit station and street intersection

events.description: approaching the transit bridge structure and street level intersection
reaching street level with parked vehicles and moderate traffic visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront toward the street intersection with increasing vehicle traffic and urban density

notable_agents.action: red sports car parked at the curb with doors open near the sidewalk
person in business suit walking ahead toward the street intersection

entered.detail: elevated transit station with red-lit monorail trains visible on the track
ground level street with vehicle traffic, parking areas, and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the waterfront toward a busy street intersection. The elevated transit station with red-lit trains becomes prominent ahead, while the mega-tower shifts to the right. The camera approaches street level where a red sports car is parked, and the environment becomes denser with urban infrastructure and traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit futuristic plaza that gradually transitions into a dense waterfront district dominated by corporate architecture. It begins by moving across paved tiles toward a towering blue cylindrical advertisement, passing orange barriers and palm trees as a brown pickup truck crosses the path. As the camera glides beneath the shadow of the blue tower and past a red vending machine, the lighting shifts from bright sun to shade before emerging again beside a yellow-green vendor kiosk. The scene then opens onto a wide waterfront promenade where the camera descends stairs toward the canal, revealing the massive Arasaka mega-tower looming in the background behind an elevated highway bridge. Finally, the path leads toward a busy street intersection, where the mega-tower shifts to the right as the environment becomes denser with red-lit transit trains and a parked red sports car.
